title: Cohere Rerank: hosted rerank API review | reranker.uk
description: Cohere Rerank review: rerank-v3.5 and rerank-english-v3.0 compared. Benchmarks, pricing, Python and Node SDK usage, pros and cons for adding reranking to RAG.
og_title: Cohere Rerank — hosted rerank API review
og_description: A mature hosted rerank API with strong multilingual quality, generous free tier, and SDK support in Python, Node, Java and Go.
